messages: Wishing you a day full of success!
Your dedication makes a difference every day.
Today is a great day to help your patients!
Your work transforms lives. Keep going!
Let's start this day with positive energy!
Every patient is an opportunity to do good.
Your expertise and care are invaluable.
May it be a productive and fulfilling day!
Your commitment inspires the whole team.
Today will be an excellent day in medicine!

patientPage.noConsultsHint: Start a new consultation using the button above.

informesList.emptySubtitle: Create a new report to start a consultation.
informesList.emptyHint: Create a new report to start a consultation.

informePage.title: Consultation report
informePage.processingHint: AI is analyzing the consultation. This may take a moment.
informePage.errorHint: An error occurred while generating the reports. Please try again.

grabarPage.title: Record consultation
grabarPage.subtitle: Start recording when the consultation with the patient begins.
grabarPage.step2: Conduct the consultation with the patient normally
grabarPage.step4: AI will analyze the conversation and automatically generate two reports

audioRecorder.stateIdleHint: Press the button to start the consultation
audioRecorder.errorMicDenied: Microphone permission denied. Please allow microphone access.
audioRecorder.transcriptFallback: Audio could not be transcribed automatically. Please review the recording.
audioRecorder.successDescription: The medical and patient reports are ready.

informeEditor.consentText: {patientName} confirmed having read the report and gave consent on {patientConsentAt}.

consentSection.title: Patient consent
consentSection.pending: The patient must review and confirm the report before proceeding
consentSection.instructions: The patient must read the consultation summary and confirm the content is correct before the report is finalized. Once confirmed, the PDF will be regenerated with the consent stamp.
consentSection.consentCheckboxLabel: I, {patientName}, confirm that I have read the medical consultation summary and consent that the content is correct and reflects what was discussed during the consultation.
consentSection.consentConfirmedMessage: {firstName} confirmed having read and agreed to the report content.

deleteInforme.title: Delete report?
deleteInforme.description: This action will permanently delete the report from {date}, including the audio, generated report and all related data. This action cannot be undone.
deleteInforme.successDesc: The report from {date} was successfully deleted.

deleteInformeButton.confirmDescription: This action will permanently delete the report from {date}, including the audio, generated report and all related data. This action cannot be undone.
deleteInformeButton.successMessage: The report from {date} was successfully deleted.

whatsapp.toastDesc: WhatsApp was opened to send the report to {name}.

whatsappButton.label: Send via WhatsApp
whatsappButton.successMessage: WhatsApp was opened to send the report to {patientName}.

landing.heroSubtitle: Record your consultations, and let artificial intelligence generate detailed medical and patient reports automatically. Save time and improve documentation quality.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need for better medical documentation
landing.feature1Desc: Simply record your consultation and our AI handles the rest. No typing required.
landing.feature2Desc: Automatically generates both a detailed medical report and a patient-friendly summary.
landing.feature3Desc: Built-in digital consent workflow so patients can review and approve their reports.
landing.feature4Desc: Send patient reports directly via WhatsApp with a single click.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join doctors who are saving hours every week on medical documentation.
